message:
fix: correct package name in cleanup-old-images workflow

The cleanup-old-images job was failing with 'Package not found' because
the package-name was set to 'devcontainer' but the actual package name
is 'packnplay/devcontainer' (based on IMAGE_NAME variable).

This fixes the cleanup job to use the correct package name.

files.patch:
@@ -140,7 +140,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Delete old daily images
         uses: actions/delete-package-versions@v4
         with:
-          package-name: devcontainer
+          package-name: packnplay/devcontainer
           package-type: container
           min-versions-to-keep: 7 # Keep last 7 daily builds
           delete-only-untagged-versions: false
\ No newline at end of file
